title: Bulenox vs TPT (2026): One Irrevocable Choice at Signup vs Three Forced by the Firm
description: Bulenox and TPT both lock you into rule-shape decisions you cannot undo — but Bulenox makes you pick ONCE at signup (Option 1 vs Option 2, permanent for the account's life) while TPT shifts the trail TYPE under your feet three times across Test → PRO → PRO+. Different lock families. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: Bulenox vs TPT (2026): One Irrevocable Choice at Signup vs Three Forced by the Firm
og.description: Bulenox makes you pick the trail mechanic ONCE at signup (permanent for life). TPT changes it THREE times across the lifecycle (firm-imposed). Honest 2026 side-by-side.
